design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and highly functional. The dashboard must act as a 'Control Room' for Bitsparx Tech, maximizing data density through modular progressive disclosure. High contrast text, minimal decoration, and grid-based structural layouts.

headings.styling: tracking-tight, leading-none, font-bold, do not center unless necessary

monospaced.usage: Data tables, KPI metrics, timers, SLA badges, and IDs.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: dense padding for widgets (p-4 or p-6), generous margins between sections
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton. Use border-collapse style layouts with sharp 1px borders. Minimal rounded corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none).

components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover: slight shadow-sm, -translate-y-[1px].
components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-sm). Primary buttons use brand color with white text. High contrast focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-300).
components.tables: Dense layout, sticky headers. Use pure white background. Highlight rows on hover with #F1F5F9. Right-align numeric columns.
components.badges: For SLA timers, statuses. Tiny text (text-xs), uppercase, wide tracking (tracking-widest). High contrast text.

navigation.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar. Stark White (#FFFFFF) with a hard right border (#E2E8F0) to keep the Swiss aesthetic pure.
navigation.header: Sticky top nav. Solid white background with a 1px bottom border. Include user profile, global search, and WhatsApp notification center.

image_urls.description: Abstract black and blue geometric background to be used for the Login page split screen.
Tech office building exterior, can be used for company profile section or login visual.
Diverse team placeholder image. Useful for Employee profiles or HR module dashboard.

icons_and_assets.instructions: Install using 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react'. Use Phosphor Icons for a dense, high-end technical aesthetic. Use 'regular' or 'bold' weights.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must change state visually. Text color must explicitly change on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-blue-600).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use short, crisp transitions. transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a 12-module dashboard structure: Attendance, Project Finance & Expenses, Projects, Employees, Meetings & Calendar, Client Visit/Location, Asset Master, AMC & Maintenance, Helpdesk/Tickets, Document Manager, Reports & Analytics, Client CRM.
Implement 'Progressive Disclosure'. Dashboard should have a top-left 'North Star' KPI, top row for supporting KPIs, middle area for charts, and lower area for data tables.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'Satoshi' for body.
No generic SaaS purple/teal gradients. Stick to the high-contrast palette: Stark White, 10% Grey, deep piercing Blue (#003EDB) for primary actions.
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for foundational structural layouts (sidebar, topbar, bento grids). Rely on customized Shadcn components for complex interactions (Tables, Dropdowns, Datepickers).
Do NOT use heavy shadows. Use 1px borders (border-slate-200) to separate components.
Ensure all critical actionable elements have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="login-button"').
The UI should feel dense but highly readable (like a Bloomberg terminal or high-end fintech app).
Include a mock WhatsApp Notification icon in the header that displays a drop-down of recent WhatsApp message statuses via SpringEdge.
